answer: Help Scout does not provide API access on its Free plan [1]. API access is a feature reserved for paid subscription tiers [1][2]. To utilize the Help Scout API, you must upgrade to at least the Plus plan [2]. The developer documentation for integrating with their REST API is available at https://developer.helpscout.com [1][3].
